title: Polish Burrata Salad
description: A refreshing salad that combines creamy burrata cheese with crunchy polish rye bread and the earthy sweetness of ayurvedic herbs.

ingredients.name: ayurvedic fresh herbs
ingredients.notes: such as cilantro, parsley, or dill

instructions: Tear the polish rye bread into small pieces and place it in a large bowl.
Cut the burrata cheese into small pieces and add it to the bowl with the bread.
Add the crunchy red onion to the bowl and sprinkle with ayurvedic fresh herbs.
Drizzle the resinous olive oil over the salad and toss to combine.
Squeeze the juice of 1 lemon over the salad and toss again to coat.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
